string.description: Text value for descriptions, commands, paths, and unit names

boolean.signature: yes | no | true | false | on | off | 1 | 0
boolean.description: Boolean setting accepting multiple truthy and falsy string representations

time_span.description: Time span with unit suffix for timeouts, delays, and intervals

size.description: Byte size with optional IEC or SI suffix for memory and storage limits

path.description: Absolute file system path for executables, working directories, and PID files

unit_name.description: Systemd unit identifier with name and type suffix

exec_command.description: Command line with optional prefixes: - ignore failure, + full privileges, ! keep env
